creator: george@m5p.com
text: I have a problem possibly related to this.  In the process of upgrading from 13.4-RELEASE to 14.2-RELEASE, I moved from realtek-re-kmod-197.00 to realtek-re-kmod-1100.00.1402000_1 and got a completely dead network interface (RTL8111/8168/8211/8411 PCI Express Gigabit Ethernet Controller according to pciconf -lv).  So I went to realtek-re-kmod198-198.00.1402000 instead and everything is great again.  Different bug or same bug?
